title: The Slow, But Dangerous, Life
overview: After dying, Ryo Mihara finds himself reincarnated in a fantasy world with the ability to cast water magic.

title: Abel the Castaway
overview: Ryo encounters a castaway who requests his help.

title: The Town of Lune
overview: Abel is welcomed back in the town of Lune and Ryo gets acquainted with civilization.

title: Eclipses & Akuma
overview: As Ryo settles into life as an adventurer, he has an unexpected encounter with a menacing foe.

title: The Great Tidal Bore
overview: Ryo looks for ways to prepare for another akuma encounter, while trouble is brewing in the dungeon.

title: The Sealed Dungeon
overview: The aftermath of the Great Tidal Bore brings visitors from out of town who might be just as troublesome.

title: Beyond the Gate
overview: As Abel escorts a team of academics through the dungeon, a strange warp puts them all in danger.

title: Unprecedented
overview: Ryo comes to Abel's rescue in the depths of the dungeon, facing off against mysterious enemies.

title: Nils and the Mysterious Town
overview: A quest that takes Ryo to Nils hometown reveals more about the magical world.

title: The Open Port Festival
overview: Ryo and his roommates travel to the coastal town of Whitnash for a job.

title: The Inferno Magician
overview: As Princess Fiona and her brother come under attack, the Inferno Magician rushes to their rescue.

title: Ryo Returns Home
overview: Ryo's otherworldly water magic clashes against the furious flames of the Inferno Magician.
